description: Worst mirror ever? No. Cleanest mirror in three waves. Rufflet (#627) evolves into Braviary (#628) at level 54 per canon, single two-stage line, both stages male-exclusive, both Takao-Unno-designed bald-eagle Americana for Unova. Two trivia-passed IP-verified endpoints. Both had pre-existing Related-cards footnotes already pointing at each other for this exact pass. Mirror sigh administered.
citations: [PokemonTCG.io: evolvesFrom field, canonical mechanical citation for TCG evolution chains]
[Bulbapedia: Braviary, Takao Unno design + Unova/bald-eagle mapping + male-only gender exclusivity]
other_candidates_considered: Black Bolt Rufflet (077-086) ↔ Braviary mirror — DEFERRED: Black Bolt Rufflet has vision but NO trivia and ip_verified:false. Drawing a mirror from a trivia-thin endpoint dilutes the line's canonical anchor. When Black Bolt Rufflet's trivia passes in a future wave, a second Edgelord can N:1 it onto the existing mirror, converting this dyad into a 3-card stack with Braviary as the hub-side anchor.

Vullaby/Mandibuzz counterpart-line edge — not in corpus per current ingest. Surface as a future-wave trigger if either species enters inventory: the female-only counterpart line is canonically the inverse of Rufflet/Braviary and would constitute a quadrilateral if all four nodes exist.
future_wave_triggers: When Black Bolt Rufflet (077-086) gets trivia + IP-verify: draw N:1 from it onto Braviary, converting mirror to stack.
If Vullaby or Mandibuzz ever enters inventory: consider proposing a `unova-gendered-raptor-lines` symbol/character node anchoring all four; until then, do not.
